feed.title: realufo.org — Uruguay · CRIDOVNI
feed.subtitle: Latest declassified records mirrored from Uruguay · CRIDOVNI.
feed.rights: Per-source jurisdiction (US 17 U.S.C. §105, UK OGL v3, France Loi 78-753, Brazil LAI 12.527, Chile 20.285, etc.)

entry.title: Fuerza Aérea Uruguaya — homepage
entry.summary: FAU's institutional site. CRIDOVNI announcements appear here as press releases rather than on a dedicated portal.

entry.title: Ministerio de Defensa Nacional — Uruguay
entry.summary: Parent ministry — Defence-policy publications and CRIDOVNI-related ministerial communiqués.

entry.title: Archivo General de la Nación — Uruguay
entry.summary: Uruguay's national archive — long-term custodian of CRIDOVNI and FAU records once declassified.
